title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
